note: Lane D completed successfully. All animation tokens, new components (Slider, ColorPicker, EmptyState), and Storybook stories created. Typecheck passes (0 new errors). The smart_bun tool has a bug where it can't find the `typecheck` script in packages/ui/package.json even though the script exists — needed to invoke tsgo directly via ./node_modules/.bin/tsgo. Also, the smart rerouting for bash commands was too aggressive at times, preventing legitimate command execution.
